title: Filters do not show all groups

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

If I open the filter section, not all groups are being displayed. See also the attached image.

This way I can’t set up a right ‘saved filter’ section. Is this a known bug? Or will the filter only show the groups that have issues in them?

And there is a group called ‘Top group’ in the filters. Any idea where that comes from?

Thanks in advance.

Cheers,
Eltjo

image750×1196 47 KB

posts.author: ppilalas (Philip)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to set up a table in a Dashboard that only displays items we are behind on and I can’t. Subtractive filters would be nice.

posts.author: alexhermida (Alex Hermida)
posts.cookedHtml:
Maybe this is not a bug but I think this is a relevant issue.

I have custom table views for filtering some groups (Archived items as an example), but for being able to use correctly those views all previously selected groups should be available, not only the ones with items at some particular moment.

It’s annoying losing access to empty groups and going to the “Main table” for moving an item to any of those groups.

Any thoughts or comments from monday.com team?

posts.author: datea-lukas (Lukas )
posts.cookedHtml: i have the exact same situation - is there anything i can do to show empty groups in views with enabled filter?

posts.author: datea-lukas (Lukas )
posts.cookedHtml: this is not the problem. i am doing what you suggest but my problem is that groups where no items are in, are hidden within the view. i want to see empty groups in my views.

posts.author: Katy (Katy Tiutyuma)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you any luck with this? I am in the same boat. I have a filtered view but if the group is empty it does not show.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same issue, I could have swore there was a “hide empty groups” option or something I could untick.

posts.author: patrick.crawley (Patrick Crawley)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree this is an unwanted feature, or at minimum should be an optional feature. I can see where groups are used as groups of tasks and all are done that it should disappear. But as part of a kahnban process without a new task thr group is missing, so people want to create a new one.

posts.author: joe.morgans (Joseph Morgans)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having the same issue here.

I have a top group named ‘New Purchase Orders’, once a department label is selected it moves the item to the correct group. When in a filtered view it hides the empty group ‘New Purchase Orders’, so when I add a new item it puts it in whatever department group is shown at the top of the filtered view. So annoying.

Has anyone found a way around this?

posts.author: Andoni00 (Andoni)
posts.cookedHtml: Facing the same issue. This feature seems to exist under ‘Group by’ but does not work if using custom group values.
